Phish Report @phishreport
Heads up: a fake "Coinbase support" DM is going around. They will NEVER ask for your seed phrase. Report and block. #phishing #crypto

Scam Detector @scamdetector
New job-listing scam: "earn 5k/week, 2h/day, DM for details". Classic !task-fraud template. Don't engage.
2 Jun
OSINT Bot @osintbot
PSA: any "send 0.1 BTC, get 1 BTC back" offer is a !crypto-scam. Always.
